# Butterchurn Presets 2.4.7

Vendored source:

- npm package: `butterchurn-presets@2.4.7`
- npm URL: https://www.npmjs.com/package/butterchurn-presets/v/2.4.7
- GitHub URL: https://github.com/jberg/butterchurn-presets
- License: MIT

This package contains converted Butterchurn preset JSON and browser bundle files, not raw `.milk` preset text. It is vendored because the upstream package declares MIT licensing and includes the MIT license text in `LICENSE`.

MilkRust keeps this pack as third-party compatibility material. Native `.milk` packs with no explicit license remain link-only in `content/catalog.json`.
